chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

text: 2957 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُرَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «يَقْطَعُ صَاحِبُ اَلْعُمْرَةِ اَلْمُفْرَدَةِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا وَضَعَتِ اَلْإِبِلُ أَخْفَافَهَا فِي اَلْحَرَمِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2957 - In a narration from Murazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"The one performing Umrah Mufradah should stop the Talbiyah when the camels place their hooves within the Haram."
